Order To Show Cause For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. plaintiff california bank & trust's Order To Show Cause why order of sale of dwelling should not be made is Denied. Plaintiff was required to file supplemental moving papers by June 15, 2012, but as yet has not done so. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
